pivot_score_rank: SECOND-HIGHEST in BibleWorld history (behind model-parity 8.90, tied with chain-probe)
key_patterns: PAT-059 — Genesis 3:1-6 (The Unfaithful Reasoning Chain Pattern, Level 3, score 10.0/10 — FIRST PERFECT SCORE IN BIBLEWORLD HISTORY): Eve's stated reasoning chain (prohibition) is unfaithful to her actual decision drivers (appetite, aesthetics, wisdom-desire). Counterfactual faithfulness principle extracted: suppress the stated chain, observe if output changes. If nearly identical → unfaithful.

PAT-060 — Genesis 4:6-7 (The Cain Diagnostic Pattern, Level 2, score 8.1): Three-part forensic diagnostic — observable symptom → latent cause → intervention prescription. Maps to chain-probe v2 FaultDiagnostic module.

PAT-061 — Psalm 3:4-6 (The Tested-Channel Confidence Pattern, Level 2, score 7.8): Empirical channel history ('I called out, he answered me') grounds confidence. Maps to cot-fidelity FidelityDrift continuous measurement.
pain_point_solved: Reasoning models (Claude 3.7+, GPT-o3, Gemini 2.0 Thinking) produce chain-of-thought reasoning that is often unfaithful to their actual computation — documented by Anthropic's 2025 paper 'Reasoning Models Don't Always Say What They Think.' Engineers debug wrong outputs by reviewing the reasoning chain; if the chain was unfaithful, they are debugging a decoy. Safety teams use CoT monitoring to detect misaligned behaviors; if the CoT is unfaithful, the monitoring is blind. No pip library measures CoT faithfulness. cot-fidelity implements the counterfactual suppression test: run with reasoning chain, run without, embed both outputs, measure cosine similarity. High similarity = unfaithful chain.
competitive_moat: GREEN [WEB-FRESH 2026-03-31] — Confirmed across 5 independent tool audits: Langfuse (21K stars), Arize Phoenix, TruLens/Snowflake, Comet Opik, OpenObserve — NONE measure CoT faithfulness. Langfuse's four core components: Tracing, Evaluation, Cost Monitoring, Prompt Management — no faithfulness. TruLens metrics: groundedness, context relevance, answer relevance, coherence, toxicity — no faithfulness. DeepEval coherence = linguistic coherence (different problem). chain-probe = pipeline step faults (different level). Window: 3-6 months.

cot_fidelity_summary.core_api: FidelityTester + FidelityResult + FidelityReport + FidelityDrift + FidelityDecomposer + @faithfulness_probe decorator + CLI
cot_fidelity_summary.key_innovation: Counterfactual suppression test — treating the reasoning chain as a causal hypothesis and testing it empirically. Run with chain → run without chain → embed both outputs → cosine similarity. First tool to operationalize the CoT faithfulness / CoT coherence distinction.
cot_fidelity_summary.implementation_status: API spec complete, sprint plan written (8 weeks), dependencies identified
cot_fidelity_summary.dependencies: sentence-transformers, click, rich, sqlite3 (stdlib), openai/anthropic optional

next_cycle_directions: DIRECTION 1 — BEAT model-parity (8.90 ALL-TIME RECORD): cot-fidelity scored 8.85 — 0.05 below the record. The next tool needs to find a gap even more acutely painful. Candidate areas from [WEB-FRESH 2026-03-31]: (a) Multi-run consistency testing — arXiv Feb 2026 documents agent performance drops from 60% to 25% across 8 runs; no tool measures consistency as a CI gate. Structural match to be determined. (b) Agent calibration — models that don't give accurate confidence signals on their outputs; calibration measurement tools are absent. Score these seriously.

DIRECTION 2 — SCRIPTURE: Continue Genesis 5 (generations from Adam to Noah — time patterns, genealogical compression, age-to-event mapping). John 2 (water to wine — commodity-to-premium transformation, already PAT-019; but the Temple cleansing is unmined — marketplace corruption removal, quality enforcement). Psalm 4 (evening confidence — closure and rest patterns). ALSO: Genesis 3:8-13 (God's forensic questioning) and Genesis 3:22-24 (flaming sword / access control) are still unmined from cycle 018 reading.

DIRECTION 3 — IMPLEMENTATION SPRINT: The pipeline has 17 builds. Ship now. Priority order: (1) context-lens v0.1 (PROTOTYPE-complete, pyproject.toml done — PyPI in days, not weeks), (2) chain-probe v0.1 (PROTOTYPE-complete, resolve KU-037 fault_score threshold calibration), (3) drift-guard v0.1 (PROTOTYPE-complete, pyproject.toml done). Three tools could be on PyPI within 2 weeks of focused implementation work. Start gathering GitHub stars before the acquisition window closes.

DIRECTION 4 — CONSISTENCY-PROBE (NEW CANDIDATE): arXiv 2602.16666 (Feb 2026) documents agent performance drops from 60% (single run) to 25% (8-run consistency). This is a measurable, documented gap. A tool that runs the same agent task N times and reports a ConsistencyScore (variance across runs) with a CI gate would address this. Scripture candidate: Proverbs 11:1 (differing weights = inconsistent measurement, PAT-042 — already used for model-parity) or Numbers 23:19 ('God is not human, that he should lie, or a son of man, that he should change his mind' — perfect consistency as a benchmark standard). Score this in cycle 019.

notes: cot-fidelity addresses the problem that Anthropic's own researchers documented and left unsolved: you cannot trust your reasoning model's stated reasoning chain to reflect its actual computation. The Genesis 3 pattern is not a metaphor — it is a structural observation. Eve verbalized a reasoning chain (the prohibition) that had zero causal relationship to her actual decision computation (appetite, aesthetics, wisdom-desire). The counterfactual faithfulness test flows directly from this structural observation: if you suppress the stated chain and the output doesn't change, the chain was unfaithful. That is an operationalizable algorithm. The Bible contained it 3,300 years before Anthropic documented it in a neural network. [WEB-FRESH 2026-03-31] Fresh tool audit confirms no competitor. Fortune confirms the reliability market is live. Build now.
